title: Spicy Tender Chaat Tagliatelle
description: A unique fusion of Indian and Italian flavors, featuring tender meat in a spicy chaat sauce served over tagliatelle.
instructions: Cook the tagliatelle pasta according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook until browned.
Add the garlic, cumin, coriander, garam masala, and cayenne pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tender pork shoulder to the pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Add 1 cup of water to the pan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chaat masala and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the cooked tagliatelle pasta and cook for 1-2 minutes, until well combined.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Rest the meat for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly against the grain.
